<!--
This repo is authored by AI agents. Fill in every section. Use /pr-description
to generate the body from the branch's commits. No em dashes anywhere.
-->

## Summary

<!--
1 to 3 sentences. Lead with the user-facing impact when there is one
(e.g. "Stops the server from leaking PORT into spawned agents"). If the
change is purely structural, say so plainly.
-->

## Changes

<!--
Bulleted list, one concrete change per bullet. Reference paths when it
helps the reviewer locate the change. Group by area when the PR spans
multiple domains.

Example:
- `apps/server/src/domains/agents/service/runner/state.ts`: split idle and waiting branches
- `apps/web/src/domains/chat`: new `MessageInput` component, exported via index
- Docs: updated `apps/server/CLAUDE.md` migration state
-->

## Testing

<!--
How was this verified? Be specific.

- Gates run: typecheck / build / lint / test (which ones, and the result).
- Test files added or updated, with paths.
- Manual verification steps if any (what was clicked, what was observed).

If a category from the root CLAUDE.md "When to test" list was touched,
the matching test file must appear here.
-->

## Notes for reviewers

<!--
Anything subtle: design tradeoffs, deferred follow-ups, edge cases the
reviewer should look at first, places the diff is misleading.

If nothing applies, write "None.".
-->
